message:
deps: bump serde_json 1.0.140 -> 1.0.149

Patch bump within 1.x. Internal parser/writer improvements; existing
serialize/deserialize output for typical JSON is unchanged. The
`preserve_order` feature continues to work the same way on IndexMap.

Verification: rch exec -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets clean.
